category_sources: Official Inglorion page says detach forks a new process, detaches it from the terminal, and executes a command.
source_facts.description: execute given command in detached process.
display_name_sources: Official Inglorion project page title is `detach`.
docs_sources: Official project page includes introduction, downloads, installation, examples, and alternatives.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Inglorion page publishes source tarballs but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official Inglorion page explains terminal detachment and command execution examples.
